languages.text: This Necron spent a long time under the ice and is partially damaged

traits.locale_text: This Necron spent a long time under the ice and is partially damaged

languages.text:
This unit's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced:
-<indent=5%>to 50% of maximum if a generator overload hits this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 70% of maximum if an electrical circuit reached this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 90% of maximum if neither event occurred.</indent>
languages.original_text: This Necron spent a long time under the ice and is partially damaged

traits.locale_text: This unit's wounds are reduced. They are equal to 50% of its maximum wounds if a generator overload hit this block of ice. They are equal to 70% if an electrical circuit reached this block of ice. They are equal to 90% if neither event occurred.

This unit's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced:
-<indent=5%>to 50% of maximum if a generator overload hits this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 70% of maximum if an electrical circuit reached this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 90% of maximum if neither event occurred.</indent>

This unit's wounds are reduced:
-<indent=5%>to 50% of maximum if a generator overload hits this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 70% of maximum if an electrical circuit reached this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 90% of maximum if neither event occurred.</indent>

This unit's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced:
-<indent=5%>to 50% of maximum if a generator overload {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hits{/g} this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 70% of maximum if an electrical circuit reached this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 90% of maximum if neither event occurred.</indent>

languages.text:
{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Здоровье{/g} этого бойца уменьшено:
-<indent=5%>до 50% от максимального, если на глыбу льда воздействует перегрузка генератора.</indent>
-<indent=5%>до 70% от максимального, если на глыбу льда воздействует электрическая цепь.</indent>
-<indent=5%>до 90% от максимального, если ничего из перечисленного не произошло.</indent>
languages.original_text:
This unit's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced:
-<indent=5%>to 50% of maximum if a generator overload hits this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 70% of maximum if an electrical circuit reached this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 90% of maximum if neither event occurred.</indent>

traits.locale_text:
{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Здоровье{/g} этого бойца уменьшено:
-<indent=5%>до 50% от максимального, если на глыбу льда воздействует перегрузка генератора.</indent>
-<indent=5%>до 70% от максимального, если на глыбу льда воздействует электрическая цепь.</indent>
-<indent=5%>до 90% от максимального, если ничего из перечисленного не произошло.</indent>

{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Здоровье{/g} этого бойца уменьшено:
-<indent=5%>до 50% от максимального, если на глыбу льда воздействует перегрузка генератора.</indent>
-<indent=5%>до 70% от максимального, если на глыбу льда воздействует электрическая цепь.</indent>
-<indent=5%>до 90% от максимального, если ничего из перечисленного не произошло.</indent>

languages.text:
Les {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g} de cette unité sont réduites :
-<indent=5%>à 50 % de leur maximum si un générateur surchargé touche ce bloc de glace.</indent>
-<indent=5%>à 70 % de leur maximum si un circuit électrique atteint ce bloc de glace.</indent>
-<indent=5%>à 90 % de leur maximum si aucun de ces deux événements ne se produit.</indent>
languages.original_text:
This unit's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced:
-<indent=5%>to 50% of maximum if a generator overload hits this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 70% of maximum if an electrical circuit reached this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 90% of maximum if neither event occurred.</indent>

traits.locale_text:
Les {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g} de cette unité sont réduites :
-<indent=5%>à 50 % de leur maximum si un générateur surchargé {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}touche{/g} ce bloc de glace.</indent>
-<indent=5%>à 70 % de leur maximum si un circuit électrique atteint ce bloc de glace.</indent>
-<indent=5%>à 90 % de leur maximum si aucun de ces deux événements ne se produit.</indent>

languages.text:
Bu birimin {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanı şu durumlarda azalır:
-<indent=5%>Bir jeneratör aşırı yüklenmesi bu buz blokuna vurursa maksimum sağlık puanının %50'si.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Bir elektrik devresi bu buz blokuna ulaşırsa maksimum sağlık puanının %70'i.</indent>
-<indent=5%>İki olay da meydana gelmezse maksimum sağlık puanının %90'ı.</indent>
languages.original_text:
This unit's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced:
-<indent=5%>to 50% of maximum if a generator overload hits this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 70% of maximum if an electrical circuit reached this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 90% of maximum if neither event occurred.</indent>

traits.locale_text:
Bu birimin {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanı şu durumlarda azalır:
-<indent=5%>Bir jeneratör aşırı yüklenmesi bu buz blokuna {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vurursa{/g} maksimum sağlık puanının %50'si.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Bir elektrik devresi bu buz blokuna ulaşırsa maksimum sağlık puanının %70'i.</indent>
-<indent=5%>İki olay da meydana gelmezse maksimum sağlık puanının %90'ı.</indent>

languages.text:
该单位的{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}会降低：
- <indent=5%>若发电机过载命中此冰块，降至最大生命值的50%。</indent>
- <indent=5%>若电路连接到此冰块，降至最大生命值的70%。</indent>
- <indent=5%>若上述情况均未发生，降至最大生命值的90%。</indent>
languages.original_text:
This unit's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced:
-<indent=5%>to 50% of maximum if a generator overload hits this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 70% of maximum if an electrical circuit reached this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 90% of maximum if neither event occurred.</indent>

traits.locale_text:
该单位的{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}会降低：
- <indent=5%>若发电机过载{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}此冰块，降至最大生命值的50%。</indent>
- <indent=5%>若电路连接到此冰块，降至最大生命值的70%。</indent>
- <indent=5%>若上述情况均未发生，降至最大生命值的90%。</indent>

languages.text:
Las {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g} de esta unidad se reducen:
-<indent=5%>al 50 % de su máximo si una sobrecarga de generador golpea este bloque de hielo.</indent>
-<indent=5%>al 70 % de su máximo si un circuito eléctrico ha alcanzado este bloque de hielo.</indent>
-<indent=5%>al 90 % de su máximo si no ha sucedido nada de lo anterior.</indent>
languages.original_text:
This unit's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced:
-<indent=5%>to 50% of maximum if a generator overload hits this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 70% of maximum if an electrical circuit reached this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 90% of maximum if neither event occurred.</indent>

traits.locale_text:
Las {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g} de esta unidad se reducen:
-<indent=5%>al 50 % de su máximo si una sobrecarga de generador {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}golpea{/g} este bloque de hielo.</indent>
-<indent=5%>al 70 % de su máximo si un circuito eléctrico ha alcanzado este bloque de hielo.</indent>
-<indent=5%>al 90 % de su máximo si no ha sucedido nada de lo anterior.</indent>

languages.text:
Die {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g} dieser Einheit werden wie folgt reduziert:
-<indent=5%>Auf 50 % des Maximums, wenn eine Generatorüberladung diesen Eisblock trifft.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Auf 70 % des Maximums, wenn ein elektrischer Schaltkreis diesen Eisblock erreicht hat.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Auf 90 % des Maximums, wenn keines der Ereignisse auftritt.</indent>
languages.original_text:
This unit's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced:
-<indent=5%>to 50% of maximum if a generator overload hits this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 70% of maximum if an electrical circuit reached this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 90% of maximum if neither event occurred.</indent>

traits.locale_text:
Die {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g} dieser Einheit werden wie folgt reduziert:
-<indent=5%>Auf 50 % des Maximums, wenn eine Generatorüberladung diesen Eisblock {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}trifft{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Auf 70 % des Maximums, wenn ein elektrischer Schaltkreis diesen Eisblock erreicht hat.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Auf 90 % des Maximums, wenn keines der Ereignisse auftritt.</indent>

languages.text:
このユニットの{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}傷{/g}は軽減される:
-<indent=5%>この氷のブロックに発電機の過負荷が{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}ヒット{/g}した場合、最大値の50%に。
-<indent=5%>この氷のブロックに電気回路が到達した場合、最大値の70%に。
-<indent=5%>どちらのイベントも発生しなかった場合、最大値の90%に。
languages.original_text:
This unit's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} are reduced:

-<indent=5%>to 70% of maximum if an electrical circuit reached this block of ice.</indent>
-<indent=5%>to 90% of maximum if neither event occurred.</indent>

-<indent=5%>どちらのイベントも発生しなかった場合、最大値の90%に。
